emails.subject: VaR Methodology Change
emails.body: VaR Methodology Change Gentlemen, Below is a plan of action for moving along with the VaR methodology change related to forward-forward volatility: 1. Finalize the methodology proposed (Research/Market Risk) determine the time period used to calculated forward-forward vols vs. correlations (20 days vs. 60 days) stabilize the calculation for curves and time periods where the curve does not change based on historical prices, implying volatility of 0% 2. Get approval for the methodology change from Rick Buy (see draft of the memo attached) John Lavorato and John Sherriff 3. Develop and implement the new methodology in a stage environment (Research/IT) 4. Test the new methodology (Market Risk, Traders) 5. Migrate into production (Research/IT) Please let me know if this is reasonable and meets everyone's expectations. Vlady.

emails.subject: Re: VaR Methodology Change
emails.body: Re: VaR Methodology Change Let's get this done quickly. You should tell everyone what they need to do to accomplish this. John.
